title: neobuxbaumia multiareolata
intro: Neobuxbaumia multiareolata, also known as the Mexican columnar cactus, is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Neobuxbaumia multiareolata include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of digestive issues, among others. The plant is commonly prepared for medicinal use in the form of infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are made from its leaves, stems, and roots.
